rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, a hearing is required. =(302/PJB/AY)

rulings.Case Title: RANDALL FAY WONG VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, OCTOBER 2, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT NACCO MATERIALS HANDLING GROUP, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant has shown that plaintiff can only show a possibility of exposure to defendant's product, which is insufficient to carry plaintiff's burden, and plaintiff has presented no evidence raising a triable issue of material fact. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied because it is unsupported by any declaration, let alone one satisfying the requirements of CCP 437 c (h). =(302/PJB/xSN)

rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' et al VS. MATTHEW C KRAMER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings

If the Court concludes that Labor Code 2699.3 is not applicable, is exhaustion nonetheless required under section 6307? =(302/PJB/xMW)
